summary: Iteration 197: Verbale di Posa in Opera - Loiano CIMS Commessa. Backend 14/14 tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with all required components.

issues: React hydration warnings in console (span inside tbody/tr) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All 4 backend endpoints working correctly for Loiano commessa (context, get, save, pdf)
Context returns 4 materials, 3 lotti EN 1090 with heat numbers A24-88731, B24-92145, F24-00287
Lotti correctly distinguish Acciaio vs Bulloneria with colored badges
Cert 3.1 references displayed in green (CM-3.1-2026/0412, etc.)
Client name C.I.M.S SCRL correctly shown
FPC Project prj_ee66232bbe9d correctly linked to com_loiano_cims_2026
Genera Verbale button on FPC Project page navigates to correct commessa
Invia a CIMS button correctly disabled as expected
seed_data_creation: Verbale was saved during testing with test data for Loiano commessa
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 197 verified Verbale di Posa in Opera for Loiano CIMS commessa. Key findings: (1) All backend endpoints working - context returns 4 materials, 3 lotti EN 1090 with correct heat numbers. (2) Lotti table shows Acciaio/Bulloneria badges with cert 3.1 references in green. (3) EXC2 execution class displayed. (4) FPC Project page Genera Verbale button correctly navigates to com_loiano_cims_2026. (5) /saldatori redirects to /operai. (6) Invia a CIMS button disabled as expected. (7) 4 checkboxes pre-checked in checklist. (8) Photo upload and signature canvas working.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/verbale-posa/context/com_loiano: PASS - Returns Loiano data with 4 materials, 3 lotti, client C.I.M.S SCRL, EXC2
backend_endpoints.GET /api/verbale-posa/com_loiano_cims_20: PASS - Returns saved verbale with exists=true

VerbalePosaPage (/verbale-posa/com_loian.dati_cantiere: PASS - Shows EXC2 execution class, Steel Project Design
VerbalePosaPage (/verbale-posa/com_loian.lotti_table: PASS - Blue border highlight, 3 lotti tracciati badge
VerbalePosaPage (/verbale-posa/com_loian.acciaio_bulloneria_badges: PASS - Colored badges distinguishing material types
VerbalePosaPage (/verbale-posa/com_loian.cert_31_green: PASS - 6 cert 3.1 references in emerald-700 green
VerbalePosaPage (/verbale-posa/com_loian.photo_upload: PASS - Drag-drop zone with Max 3 badge
